title: Campaign
description: A Campaign Manager 360 campaign. Campaigns are the top-level organizational unit for advertising activities, grouping ads, placements, and creatives under a single advertiser with shared configuration, date ranges, and targeting.

id.description: Campaign ID. This is a read-only, auto-generated field.

advertiserId.description: Advertiser ID of this campaign. Required on insert.

advertiserGroupId.description: Advertiser group ID of the associated advertiser.

name.description: Name of this campaign. Must be fewer than 512 characters and unique among campaigns of the same advertiser.

archived.description: Whether this campaign has been archived.

startDate.description: Start date of this campaign. The date format is YYYY-MM-DD.

endDate.description: End date of this campaign. Must be on or after the start date. The date format is YYYY-MM-DD.

comment.description: Arbitrary comments about this campaign. Must be fewer than 256 characters.

billingInvoiceCode.description: Billing invoice code included in the invoices.

defaultLandingPageId.description: Default landing page ID for this campaign.

audienceSegmentGroups.description: Audience segment groups assigned to this campaign. Maximum of 300 segment groups.

eventTagOverrides.description: Event tag overrides for this campaign.

creativeGroupIds.description: List of creative group IDs assigned to this campaign.

euPoliticalAdsDeclaration.description: EU political advertising declaration for this campaign.

kind.description: Identifies what kind of resource this is. Value is always dfareporting#campaign.
